## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and the reason for the change.

## Concurrency impact

State which ownership, queueing, scheduling, or synchronization invariant is
affected.

## Verification

- [ ] Debug and Release builds pass
- [ ] Unit and integration tests pass
- [ ] clang-format and clang-tidy pass
- [ ] Valgrind or a sanitizer was run for lifecycle changes
- [ ] Performance claims include reproducible benchmark data
